name: eltizamati
description: Eltizamati — unified financial obligations tracker. Jordan-first, MENA-ready.

scripts.test: pnpm run test:packages && pnpm run test:app
scripts.test:packages: pnpm --filter @eltizamati/domain test && pnpm --filter @eltizamati/finance-engine test && pnpm --filter @eltizamati/demo-data test
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run depcruise && pnpm run test
scripts.supabase:gen-types: npx supabase gen types typescript --local --schema public > apps/mobile/src/core/supabase/database.types.ts
